headline: Will DEI Board Proposals and Rising Oil Costs Change Colgate-Palmolive's (CL) Risk Oversight Narrative?
summary: On March 25, 2026, Colgate-Palmolive said it had received shareholder proposals to end DEI-based board selection criteria and to require an independent board chair, and the company urged investors to vote against both at its May 8, 2026 annual meeting. These governance and DEI challenges are emerging just as higher oil-linked input costs are squeezing margins, sharpening investor focus on Colgate-Palmolive’s risk management and board oversight. We will now examine how rising oil-based cost...

headline: Fed’s Musalem: current rates "will remain appropriate for some time"
summary: Investing.com -- Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis President Alberto Musalem said Wednesday that risks are rising to both inflation and employment, and officials should be prepared to adjust interest rates in either direction depending on how the economy evolves.

raw.headline: Fed’s Musalem: current rates "will remain appropriate for some time"
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis President Alberto Musalem said Wednesday that risks are rising to both inflation and employment, and officials should be prepared to adjust interest rates in either direction depending on how the economy evolves.

headline: Soaring gas prices to push U.S. inflation to nearly 4% in coming months: BofA
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America is warning that surging energy prices will drive U.S. headline inflation close to 4% in the coming months, with price pressures seen persisting well into next year.

raw.headline: Soaring gas prices to push U.S. inflation to nearly 4% in coming months: BofA
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America is warning that surging energy prices will drive U.S. headline inflation close to 4% in the coming months, with price pressures seen persisting well into next year.

headline: The risk of further downside in tech stocks is tied to these 3 factors: MS
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley warned in a note on Tuesday that technology stocks could face further downside risk, with oil prices complicating an already challenged macro backdrop.

raw.headline: The risk of further downside in tech stocks is tied to these 3 factors: MS
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley warned in a note on Tuesday that technology stocks could face further downside risk, with oil prices complicating an already challenged macro backdrop.

headline: Markets are too aggressive on Fed hikes, Goldman says
summary: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs is pushing back on market pricing for Federal Reserve rate hikes, arguing that traders are overestimating the risk that rising oil prices will force the central bank to tighten policy.

raw.headline: Markets are too aggressive on Fed hikes, Goldman says
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs is pushing back on market pricing for Federal Reserve rate hikes, arguing that traders are overestimating the risk that rising oil prices will force the central bank to tighten policy.

headline: BofA cuts global growth forecast on ‘mild’ stagflation shock
summary: Investing.com -- In a note to clients on Wednesday, Bank of America lowered its global growth outlook for 2026, warning that the economic fallout from the Iran war is delivering what it describes as a “mild stagflation” shock.

raw.headline: BofA cuts global growth forecast on ‘mild’ stagflation shock
